inputs.label: Purchase Price
inputs.businessContext: The price you paid to acquire the sports card.

businessContext_i18n.en: The price you paid to acquire the sports card.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Spor kartını satın almak için ödediğiniz fiyat.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Preis, den Sie für die Sportkarte bezahlt haben.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le prix que vous avez payé pour acquérir la carte de sport.

inputs.label: Sale Price
inputs.businessContext: The final selling price of the sports card.

businessContext_i18n.en: The final selling price of the sports card.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le prix de vente final de la carte de sport.

inputs.label: Grading Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of professional grading service for the card.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of professional grading service for the card.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten für die professionelle Bewertung der Karte.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût du service de classement professionnel pour la carte.

inputs.label: Shipping Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total shipping and handling costs for the transaction.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total shipping and handling costs for the transaction.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İşlem için toplam nakliye ve kargo maliyetleri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte Versand- und Bearbeitungskosten für die Transaktion.

inputs.label: Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Applicable sales tax rate as a percentage of the sale price.

businessContext_i18n.en: Applicable sales tax rate as a percentage of the sale price.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Satış fiyatının yüzdesi olarak geçerli satış vergisi oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anwendbarer Umsatzsteuersatz als Prozentsatz des Verkaufspreises.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de taxe de vente applicable en pourcentage du prix de vente.
